message:
feat(tests): massively expand integration test coverage across all engine subsystems

Adds and expands integration tests across 161+ existing test files and
38 new test suites, totaling ~58,000 lines of new test code covering
virtually every franken-engine subsystem:

New test suites added:
- adversarial_workload_synthesis_enrichment_integration
- aot_entrygraph_compiler_enrichment_integration
- bytecode_vm_enrichment_integration
- cliff_margin_certificate_enrichment_integration
- control_plane_mock_inventory_enrichment_integration
- error_code_registry
- esm_cjs_interop_parity_enrichment_integration
- evidence_ledger_enrichment_integration
- frankenlab_gap_matrix_enrichment_integration
- frx_compile_vs_fallback, frx_evidence_ledger_event_schema,
  frx_forbidden_regressions, frx_handoff_packet_schema,
  frx_logging_and_objective
- hardware_localization_residual_enrichment_integration
- hot_path_telemetry_kernel_enrichment_integration
- law_mining_enrichment_integration
- law_promotion_lifecycle_enrichment_integration
- lowering_pipeline_enrichment_integration
- module_cache_enrichment_integration
- npm_compatibility_matrix_enrichment_integration
- parser_event_ast_equivalence_enrichment_integration
- react_jsx_lowering_enrichment_integration
- react_package_cohort_enrichment_integration
- regexp_deterministic_engine_enrichment_integration
- rgc_claim_entitlement_algebra, rgc_contract_batch3,
  rgc_execution_profile_contract, rgc_small_contract_batch2,
  rgc_small_manifest_contracts
- runtime_diagnostics_cli_enrichment_integration
- scalar_replacement_engine_enrichment_integration
- shape_transition_algebra_enrichment_integration
- static_semantics_enrichment_integration
- superblock_formation_enrichment_integration
- translation_validation_receipt_enrichment_integration
- ts_resolution_manifest_enrichment_integration
- universal_dominance_ratchet_enrichment_integration
- vectorized_builtin_governance_enrichment_integration

Major expansions to existing suites include: ambient_authority (+1378),
causal_replay_enrichment (+1879), cut_line_automation_enrichment (+2427),
demotion_rollback (+1766), e2e_harness (+1534), execution_orchestrator
(+1058), fork_detection (+1331), governance_hooks (+1344),
hybrid_lane_router (+1476), law_mining (+1370), module_cache (+1343),
module_compatibility_matrix (+1755), module_resolver (+1207),
native_addon_cohort_gate (+1474), reproducibility_provenance_pack (+1554),
revocation_chain (+1286), test262_release_gate (+1719), and many more.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
